name: Butters
steps: Allow butter to soften the mix with the powder.
Refrigerate in a paco container then spin in the paco jet.
Melt the cocoa butter. Whisk into oil over ice.
Once butter is formed, transfer to paco container and refrigerate.
Rinse the anchovy fillets under water to get rid of excess salt.
Blend together with the butter and transfer to paco container and refrigerate.
